title: euphrasia officinalis subsp. tetraquetra
intro: Euphrasia officinalis subsp. tetraquetra, also known as the tetraquetra subspecies of the common eyebright, is a perennial plant belonging to the Gentianaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it effective in treating eye and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Euphrasia officinalis subsp. tetraquetra include reducing inflammation and congestion, relieving symptoms of hay fever and allergies, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are commonly used to treat various health conditions, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
